accounts.title: Manage Your Accounts
accounts.description: Track your cash, bank accounts, and credit cards in one place. Create accounts in different currencies.

contacts.title: Contact Tracking
contacts.description: Easily manage all your receivables and payables with customers and suppliers.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.description: Track your staff's salaries, advances, and other payments regularly.

analysis.title: Income & Expense Analysis
analysis.description: Analyze your business finances with detailed reports and charts.

professional.title: Professional Features
professional.description: Export your data to Excel. Support for TRY, USD, EUR and more currencies.
